subcodes.first_line: The Book of Dawn hath appeared from this Most Great Horizon, and the Lord of Destiny proclaimeth: "There is no God but Me!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر کتاب الفجر من هذا المنظر الاکبر و مالک القدر ینادی انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
